artPrompt: A deserted concrete parking structure after dark, a single flickering bulb casting a cone of sour amber light onto an oil-slick floor while a dripping pipe glints overhead, rows of pillars marching into ink-black shadow toward a vanishing point. Wet reflections streak the foreground, a faint plume of cigar smoke hangs near the light, no figures present, oppressive noir stillness. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Dimly Lit Parking Structure
text:
{T}: Add {B}.
{1}{B}, {T}: Each opponent who owes you a Favor loses 1 life. Level 3, by the elevators, after midnight. Bring an envelope. Come alone.
flavorText: One flickering light. One dripping pipe. One meeting that was never on anyone's calendar.
